info.name: Global System for Mobile Communications GSMA Camara Project SMS Delivery Notification Subscription API

description.content:
API to create, retrieve and delete event subscriptions related to a sms delivery operation performed on an associated phone number.

Contact Support:
 Email: project-email@sample.com
